title: Iran says missile program not part of talks with US

snapshot.title: Iran says missile program not part of talks with US
snapshot.description: TEHRAN: Iran said on Thursday that its missile program would not be part of future negotiations with the United States, after the two sides agreed a framework deal for ending their war. US President Donald Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian signed a memorandum of understanding early Thursday, ending a regional war that erupted on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes.
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran says missile program not part of talks with US | Arab News
